name: C#
description: A modern, object-oriented language from Microsoft for building web, mobile, and desktop applications on the .NET framework.

body.raw: C# (pronounced "C sharp") is a general-purpose, multi-paradigm programming language. C# encompasses static typing, strong typing, lexically scoped, imperative, declarative, functional, generic, object-oriented (class-based), and component-oriented programming disciplines. It is one of the programming languages designed for the Common Language Infrastructure (CLI).
body.html: C# (pronounced "C sharp") is a general-purpose, multi-paradigm programming language. C# encompasses static typing, strong typing, lexically scoped, imperative, declarative, functional, generic, object-oriented (class-based), and component-oriented programming disciplines. It is one of the programming languages designed for the Common Language Infrastructure (CLI).
